market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.48%, Nasdaq +0.70%, Dow +0.10%. Technology led sectors (+2.74%) while Utilities lagged (-1.85%). Claude Sonnet 4.6 led the day at +0.01%. 3 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +8.66%. Key headline: Here's what smart people are saying the failed US-Iran peace talks mean for markets - markets.businessinsider.com — market reaction muted.
